member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator
member.summary: Generates C# source code including classes, fields, constructors, regions, and attributes.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.StartClass(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: EN: Generates the start of a class declaration with optional inheritance CZ: Generuje začátek deklarace třídy s volitelným děděním
member.param: Whether the class should be static
Base types or interfaces to derive from

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.PublicStatic(SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.Boolean)
member.summary: EN: Writes public/protected/internal and static modifiers to the output CZ: Zapíše public/protected/internal a static modifikátory do výstupu

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.WriteAccessModifiers(SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers)
member.summary: EN: Writes the access modifier keyword to the output CZ: Zapíše klíčové slovo modifikátoru přístupu do výstupu

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.EndRegion(System.Int32)
member.summary: EN: Writes the end of a region directive CZ: Zapíše konec region direktivy

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Region(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Writes the start of a region directive with a name CZ: Zapíše začátek region direktivy se jménem

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Attribute(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Generates an attribute with parameters CZ: Generuje atribut s parametry

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.CreateEnumItemsFromList(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: EN: Creates a list of EnumItem objects from a list of strings CZ: Vytvoří seznam EnumItem objektů ze seznamu stringů
member.returns: List of EnumItem objects

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Field(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.Boolean,SunamoDevCode._public.SunamoEnums.Enums.VariableModifiers,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Generates a field declaration with optional quotation of the value CZ: Generuje deklaraci pole s volitelným přidáním uvozovek k hodnotě
member.param: Whether the field should be static
Whether to add quotes around the value

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Field(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.Boolean,SunamoDevCode._public.SunamoEnums.Enums.VariableModifiers,System.String,System.String,SunamoDevCode._public.SunamoEnums.Enums.ObjectInitializationOptions,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Generates a field declaration with initialization CZ: Generuje deklaraci pole s inicializací
member.param: Access modifier for the field. Private modifier is omitted (default).
Whether the field should be static. Ignored if initializationOption is NewAssign.
How to initialize the field: Original (use value as-is), Hyphens (add quotes), or NewAssign (use new constructor)
Initial value. If initializationOption is NewAssign, use string.Empty for empty constructor. If Original, put the part after =. Cannot be null.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Field(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.Boolean,SunamoDevCode._public.SunamoEnums.Enums.VariableModifiers,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: EN: Generates a field declaration with optional default value CZ: Generuje deklaraci pole s volitelnou výchozí hodnotou
member.param: Whether the field should be static
Whether to add a default value for the type

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.DefaultValue(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: EN: Adds a default value for the specified type (uses CSharpHelper.DefaultValueForType) CZ: Přidá výchozí hodnotu pro zadaný typ (používá CSharpHelper.DefaultValueForType)
member.param: Type to get default value for
Whether to add the default value

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.AddIntoClass(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32@,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Inserts lines into a class before the closing brace CZ: Vloží řádky do třídy před uzavírací složenou závorku
member.param: File content as list of lines
Lines to insert into the class
Output: index of the class declaration line
member.returns: Modified file content

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Namespace(System.String)
member.summary: EN: Generates a namespace declaration CZ: Generuje deklaraci namespace

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.ModifiersField(SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.Boolean,SunamoDevCode._public.SunamoEnums.Enums.VariableModifiers)
member.summary: EN: Writes field modifiers (access, static, const/readonly) to the output CZ: Zapíše modifikátory pole (přístup, static, const/readonly) do výstupu

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Ctor(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode._public.SunamoEnums.Enums.ModifiersConstructor,System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: EN: Generates a constructor declaration with parameters CZ: Generuje deklaraci konstruktoru s parametry
member.param: Name of the constructor (should match class name)
Alternating type and name pairs for parameters (type1, name1, type2, name2, ...)

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Ctor(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode._public.SunamoEnums.Enums.ModifiersConstructor,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String[])
member.summary: EN: Generates a constructor with automatic field assignment. Parameters are stored in pairs: type, name, type, name. Static constructors cannot be created here. CZ: Generuje konstruktor s automatickým přiřazením polí. Parametry jsou uloženy v párech: typ, název, typ, název. Statický konstruktor zde nelze vytvořit.
member.param: Name of the constructor (should match class name)
Whether to automatically assign parameters to fields
Whether this is a base class constructor
Alternating type and name pairs for parameters

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Property(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Object,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: EN: Generates a property with getter and setter. The get and set parameters can be string (custom implementation) or bool (auto-implementation). CZ: Generuje vlastnost s getterem a setterem. Parametry get a set mohou být string (vlastní implementace) nebo bool (auto-implementace).
member.param: Getter implementation: true for auto-implementation, string for custom code, null/false for none
Setter implementation: true for auto-implementation, string for custom code, null/false for none
Whether to use short getter syntax (get;)
Whether to use short setter syntax (set;)

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Method(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Generates a method declaration with body. The inner content must already be indented for this method. CZ: Generuje deklaraci metody s tělem. Vnitřní obsah již musí být odsazený pro tuto metodu.
member.param: Body content of the method (already indented)

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Method(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Generates a method with pre-formatted header and body content CZ: Generuje metodu s předformátovanou hlavičkou a obsahem těla

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Using(System.String)
member.summary: EN: Generates a using directive, automatically adding 'using' keyword and semicolon if needed CZ: Generuje using direktivu, automaticky přidává klíčové slovo 'using' a středník pokud chybí
member.param: Using statement (with or without 'using' keyword and semicolon)

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.If(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Generates an if statement with opening brace. Automatically adds the opening brace. CZ: Generuje if příkaz s otevírací závorkou. Automaticky přidává počáteční závorku.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Else(System.Int32)
member.summary: EN: Generates an else statement with opening brace. Automatically adds the opening brace. CZ: Generuje else příkaz s otevírací závorkou. Automaticky přidává počáteční závorku.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.EnumWithComments(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: EN: Generates an enum with XML summary comments for each member CZ: Generuje enum s XML summary komentáři pro každý člen
member.param: Dictionary mapping enum member names to their comments

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.AppendAttribute(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Appends an attribute with optional parameters CZ: Přidává atribut s volitelnými parametry

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.List(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates a list initialization with specified generic type. Default: adds quotes to string values. CZ: Generuje inicializaci seznamu se zadaným generickým typem. Výchozí: přidává uvozovky k řetězcovým hodnotám.
member.param: Generic type parameter for the list (e.g., "string", "int")
List of values to initialize with
Optional arguments for list generation (default: AddHyphens = true)

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.This(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Generates a this.memberName reference CZ: Generuje odkaz na this.memberName
member.param: Name of the member to reference

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.NewVariable(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.String,System.String,SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Creates a new variable declaration. Args.CreateInstance determines whether to instantiate the object. CZ: Vytvoří deklaraci nové proměnné. Args.CreateInstance určuje, zda instancovat objekt.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.CreateInstance(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Generates object instantiation code (variableName = new ClassName();) CZ: Generuje kód pro vytvoření instance objektu (variableName = new ClassName();)

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.Enum(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.EnumItem})
member.summary: EN: Generates an enum with XML comments and optional attributes for each member CZ: Generuje enum s XML komentáři a volitelnými atributy pro každý člen
member.param: List of enum items with their properties

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.AssignValue(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates an assignment statement (objectName.variable = value). Args.AddHyphens determines whether to wrap value in quotes. CZ: Generuje přiřazovací příkaz (objectName.variable = value). Args.AddHyphens určuje, zda obalit hodnotu do uvozovek.
member.param: Name of the variable/property to assign to

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.AddValuesViaAddRange(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates code to add multiple values to a collection via AddRange. Args.AddHyphens determines whether to wrap values in quotes. CZ: Generuje kód pro přidání více hodnot do kolekce pomocí AddRange. Args.AddHyphens určuje, zda obalit hodnoty do uvozovek.
member.param: Name of the object (can be null for static classes)
Name of the collection to add to
Values to add to the collection

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.AddValuesViaAddRange(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Type,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates code to add multiple values to a collection via AddRange (Type overload). If you don't want to use object identifier (e.g., for static classes), pass null for objectName. CZ: Generuje kód pro přidání více hodnot do kolekce pomocí AddRange (Type přetížení). Pokud nechcete použít identifikátor objektu (např. u statické třídy), předejte null pro objectName.
member.param: Name of the object (can be null for static classes)
Name of the collection to add to
Values to add to the collection

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.DictionaryNumberNumber``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,``1},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates a Dictionary with numeric key-value pairs. Args.AddingValue = true as default. CZ: Generuje Dictionary s číselnými páry klíč-hodnota. Args.AddingValue = true jako výchozí.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.DictionaryStringString(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates a Dictionary<string, string>. Args.AddingValue = true as default. CZ: Generuje Dictionary<string, string>. Args.AddingValue = true jako výchozí.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.DictionaryStringListString(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates a Dictionary<string, List<string>>. Args.CreateInstance = true as default. CZ: Generuje Dictionary<string, List<string>>. Args.CreateInstance = true jako výchozí.
member.param: Dictionary with string keys and string list values

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.DictionaryFromRandomValue``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{``0},System.Func{``1},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates a Dictionary with keys and random values. Args.AddingValue = true as default. CZ: Generuje Dictionary s klíči a náhodnými hodnotami. Args.AddingValue = true jako výchozí.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.DictionaryFromTwoList``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{``0},System.Collections.Generic.List{``1},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates a Dictionary from two lists (keys and values). Args.AddingValue = true was default. CZ: Generuje Dictionary ze dvou seznamů (klíče a hodnoty). Args.AddingValue = true byl výchozí.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.DictionaryFromDictionary``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,``1},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates a Dictionary from another dictionary. Args.AddingValue = true. CZ: Generuje Dictionary z jiného dictionary. Args.AddingValue = true.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.DictionaryFromDictionaryInnerList``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,``1},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates a Dictionary with List values from another dictionary. Default: addingValue = true. CZ: Generuje Dictionary s hodnotami List z jiného dictionary. Výchozí: addingValue = true.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.GetDictionaryValuesFromRandomValue``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{``0},System.Func{``1})
member.summary: EN: Generates dictionary value assignments from random values CZ: Generuje přiřazení hodnot do dictionary z náhodných hodnot

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.GetDictionaryValuesFromTwoList``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{``0},System.Collections.Generic.List{``1},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates dictionary value assignments from two lists. Args.SplitKeyWith allows splitting keys. CZ: Generuje přiřazení hodnot do dictionary ze dvou seznamů. Args.SplitKeyWith umožňuje rozdělení klíčů.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.GetDictionaryValuesFromDictionaryInnerList``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,System.Collections.Generic.List{``1}},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates dictionary value assignments from a dictionary with List values CZ: Generuje přiřazení hodnot do dictionary ze slovníku s hodnotami List

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.GetTKeyAndTValue``2(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,System.Collections.Generic.List{``1}},System.Type@,System.Type@,``0@)
member.summary: EN: Extracts key and value types from a dictionary with list values CZ: Získá typy klíče a hodnoty ze slovníku s hodnotami typu list

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.GetDictionaryValuesFromDictionary``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,``1})
member.summary: EN: Generates dictionary value assignments from a dictionary CZ: Generuje přiřazení hodnot do dictionary ze slovníku

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator.DictionaryStringObject``1(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,``0},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: EN: Generates a Dictionary<string, object> with values. Args.AddingValue = true as default. CZ: Generuje Dictionary<string, object> s hodnotami. Args.AddingValue = true jako výchozí.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.SunamoCSharp.Values.CSharpConsts
member.summary: Constants for C# code syntax elements

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.SunamoCSharp.Values.CSharpConsts.LineComment
member.summary: Line comment delimiter (//)

member.name: T:SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs
member.summary: Arguments for C# code generator

member.name: P:SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs.AddHyphens
member.summary: Whether to add quotes/hyphens around string values

member.name: P:SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs.CreateInstance
member.summary: Whether to create an instance of the generated type

member.name: P:SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs.AlsoField
member.summary: Whether to also generate a field

member.name: P:SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs.AddingValue
member.summary: Whether to add value to the generated code

member.name: P:SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs.UseCA
member.summary: Whether to use CA (Collection Add) helper

member.name: P:SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs.SplitKeyWith
member.summary: Delimiter to split keys with (must be char or string)

member.name: P:SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs.CheckForNull
member.summary: Whether to check for null before operations

member.name: T:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper
member.summary: Provides static helper methods for C# code analysis, generation, and manipulation.

member.name: F:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.Using
member.summary: C# using keyword prefix.

member.name: F:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.Import
member.summary: JavaScript/TypeScript import keyword prefix.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.RemoveUsing(System.String,SunamoDevCode._public.SunamoCollectionWithoutDuplicates.CollectionWithoutDuplicatesDC{System.String})
member.summary: Removes specified using directives from the source text.
member.param: Collection of namespace names to remove.
member.returns: Text with the specified using directives removed.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.AddTypeToEveryFile(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a static Type field (for ThrowEx) to every C# file that uses ThrowEx but lacks the type definition.
member.param: Base path to the Visual Studio projects folder.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.RemoveNamespace(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},SunamoDevCode._public.SunamoCollectionWithoutDuplicates.CollectionWithoutDuplicatesDC{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.param: Source code lines to modify in-place.
Collection to store removed namespace names (can be null).
Whether to also remove region directives.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.RemoveNamespace(System.String)
member.summary: Return written content to drive

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.SetValuesAsNamesToConsts(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Converts static readonly string fields without values to const fields using their names as values.
member.param: Source code lines to modify in-place.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.IsFieldVariableConst(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether a line contains a string field/variable/const declaration and extracts its name.
member.returns: Tuple of (isConstField, fieldName). fieldName is null if not a const field.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetInnerContentOfCodeElementClass(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Extracts the inner content of a class code element by removing the outer braces.
member.param: Lines of source code containing the class definition.
member.returns: The inner content between the first opening and last closing brace, or empty string if the code is empty or commented.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.IsEmptyCommentedOrOnlyWithNamespace(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Vrátí true i když obsahuje kód bez středníku (např. prázdnou třídu)
member.param: File name without extension to check against csWithSharpIf list.
Original source code lines to analyze.
Optional action to remove preprocessor directive blocks. Can be null.
List of filenames that contain #if directives and should not be considered empty.
member.returns: True if the file contains only namespace declarations, usings, comments, or is empty.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.IsEmptyOrCommented(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Determines whether all lines are either empty or commented out.
member.param: Lines of source code to check.
member.returns: True if all non-empty lines start with a comment marker.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.RemoveImportsUsings(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes import/using statements and leading empty lines from the source code lines. Edits the list directly.
member.param: Lines of source code to process.
If true, removes import statements; otherwise removes using statements.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.Usings(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Extracts all using statements from source code lines, optionally removing them.
member.param: If true, removes the using lines from the source.
member.returns: Collection of unique using statements found.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.Imports(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Extracts all import statements from source code lines, optionally removing them.
member.param: If true, removes the import lines from the source.
member.returns: Collection of unique import statements found.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.Usings(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Extracts all statements matching the given keyword from source code lines, optionally removing them.
member.param: If true, removes matching lines from the source.
member.returns: Collection of unique statements found.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.Usings(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32}@,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Extracts all statements matching the given keyword, outputting line indices and optionally removing them.
member.param: Output list of line indices where matching statements were found.
If true, removes matching lines from the source.
member.returns: Collection of unique statements found.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetDictionaryValuesFromTwoList(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Generates C# dictionary initialization code from two parallel lists of names and values.
member.param: List of dictionary values corresponding to each key.
member.returns: Generated C# code string for dictionary initialization.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetDictionaryValuesFromDictionary(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Generates C# dictionary initialization code from a string-to-string dictionary.
member.param: Source dictionary to generate code from.
member.returns: Generated C# code string for dictionary initialization.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetSummaryXmlDocumentation(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Extracts the summary section from XML documentation comments in C# source code lines.
member.param: Lines of source code containing XML documentation comments.
member.returns: The extracted summary text.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.CreateConstsForSearchUris(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Generates C# const field declarations and a list for a collection of search URIs.
member.param: List of URI strings to generate constants from.
member.returns: Generated C# code with const declarations and an aggregated list.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.CreateConsts(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Generates C# const field declarations from a dictionary of name-value pairs.
member.param: Dictionary where keys are constant names and values are constant values.
member.returns: Generated C# code with const declarations.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.DictionaryWithClass``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{``0},System.Func{``1},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: Generates a C# class containing a dictionary initialized with random values for each key.
member.param: Name for the generated class and dictionary.
List of keys for the dictionary.
Function that generates a random value for each entry.
member.returns: Generated C# code for the class with dictionary initialization.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.DictionaryWithClass``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,``1},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: Generates a C# class containing a dictionary initialized from an existing dictionary. AddingValue defaults to false.
member.param: Name for the generated class and dictionary.
Source dictionary to generate code from.
member.returns: Generated C# code for the class with dictionary initialization.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetDictionaryValuesFromDictionary``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,``1})
member.summary: Generates C# code for dictionary value assignments from a source dictionary.
member.param: Name of the dictionary variable in the generated code.
Source dictionary to generate assignment code from.
member.returns: Generated C# code for dictionary value assignments.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetDictionaryValuesFromTwoList``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{``0},System.Collections.Generic.List{``1},SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: Generates C# code for populating a dictionary from two parallel lists of keys and values.
member.param: Arguments controlling code generation behavior (e.g., splitKeyWith).
member.returns: Generated C# code string.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetDictionaryValuesFromRandomValue``2(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{``0},System.Func{``1})
member.summary: Generates C# code for dictionary value assignments using random values from a factory function.
member.param: Factory function that produces random values.
member.returns: Generated C# code string.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.RemoveXmlDocCommentsExceptSummary(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Removes empty XML doc comment tags (like empty returns) except summary blocks.
member.param: Output flag indicating whether anything was removed.
member.returns: Joined string of the modified lines.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.RemoveXmlDocComments(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Removes all XML documentation comments from the source code lines.
member.returns: Cleaned source code with comments removed.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.RemoveComments(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes line and/or block comments from source code text.
member.param: Whether to preserve line numbers by keeping newlines.
member.returns: Source code with comments removed.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.RemoveComments(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes C# line comments and/or block comments from the given source code lines.
member.param: Whether to keep original line numbers (replace comments with empty lines instead of removing).
member.returns: Processed source code lines with comments removed.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.RemoveLineComments(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Direct edit

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.RemoveBlockComments(System.String)
member.summary: Removes block comments (/* ... */) and line comments (//) from source code using regex.
member.returns: Text with block and line comments removed.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetDictionaryStringObject``1(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{``0},System.String,SunamoCSharp.Args.CSharpGeneratorArgs)
member.summary: Generates C# code for creating and populating a Dictionary with string keys and typed values.
member.returns: Generated C# code string.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.DefaultValueForTypeSqLite(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the default value string for a SQLite data type.
member.param: SQLite type name (TEXT, INTEGER, REAL, DATETIME, BLOB).
member.returns: Default value string for the given type.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetCtorInner(System.Int32,System.Collections.IList)
member.summary: Generates constructor body assignments in the form "this.field = field;" for each value.
member.param: List of field names to assign.
member.returns: Formatted constructor inner body string.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetArray(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Return also List because Array isn't use

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetList(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Generates a C# list declaration with the given name and values.
member.param: List of string values to include.
Variable name for the generated list.
member.returns: Generated C# list declaration code.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.RemoveRegions(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Removes all #region and #endregion directives from the lines.
member.returns: Lines with region directives removed.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.ReplaceForConsts(System.String)
member.summary: Replaces static readonly field declarations with const declarations in the given file.
member.param: Path to the file to process.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetConsts(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Generates static readonly string constants from the list with optional camel case convention.
member.param: List of values to generate constants from.
Whether to apply camel case convention.
member.returns: Generated constant declarations.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetConsts(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Generates C# static readonly string constant declarations from the given names and values.
member.param: Optional list of custom constant names (can be null to use values as names).
List of values for the constants.
Whether to apply camelCase convention to constant names (null = no conversion).
member.returns: Generated C# code with constant declarations.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GetConsts(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Type)
member.summary:
A1 can be null
A3 null = not use Pascal convention
GenerateConstants - const without value GetConsts - static readonly with value
member.param: Optional list of custom constant names (can be null to use values as names).
List of values for the constants.
Whether to apply camel case convention (null to skip).
Type of the constants (e.g. string, int).
member.returns: Generated constant declarations.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GenerateConstants(System.Int32,System.Func{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: GenerateConstants - const without value GetConsts - static readonly with value

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.TrimEnd(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Char[])
member.summary: Trims specified characters from the end of each string in the list.
member.param: Characters to trim from the end.
member.returns: The modified list with trimmed strings.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.ParseFields(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: value - data type key - name
member.param: Lines containing field declarations to parse.
member.returns: Dictionary mapping field names (camelCase) to their data types.

member.name: F:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.tProperty
member.summary: 0 - item.Value 1 - CSharpHelperSunamo.DefaultValueForType(item.Value) 2 - item.Key 3 - SH.FirstCharUpper(item.Key)

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.GenerateProperties(SunamoDevCode.Args.GeneratePropertiesArgs)
member.summary: Generates C# property declarations with backing fields from the given arguments.
member.param: Arguments specifying input lines and generation options.
member.returns: Generated property code.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.LineWithClass(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Finds the line containing a class declaration. If mustDerive is true, only returns classes that inherit from another.
member.param: Whether the class must derive from another class.
member.returns: The line containing the class declaration, or null if not found.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.DefaultValueForTypeObject(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the default value for a C# type as an object.
member.param: C# type name or full name to get the default for.
member.returns: Default value for the given type.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.WrapWithRegion(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Wraps the given text in a C# region directive.
member.returns: Text wrapped in region and endregion directives.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.IsKeyword(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the given string is a C# keyword. Call CsKeywords.Init before use.
member.param: String to check against keyword lists.
member.returns: True if the string is a C# keyword.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.WrapWithQuoteList(System.Type,System.Collections.IList)
member.summary: Wraps each item in the list with appropriate quotes based on the value type and joins them with commas.
member.param: Type of values to determine quoting style.
List of values to wrap and join.
member.returns: Comma-separated string of quoted values.

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.CSharpHelper.WrapWithQuote(System.Type,System.String@)
member.summary: Wraps the string value with quotes appropriate for the given type (double quotes for string, single for char).
member.param: Type to determine the quote character.
String value to wrap with quotes, modified in place.

member.name: T:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo
member.summary: Helper class for C# code processing and generation

member.name: F:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo.Type
member.summary: Type information for runtime type checking

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo.IsAllCsprojAndSlnRightInHiearchy(System.String,SunamoDevCode.TextOutputGeneratorDC)
member.summary: Checks if all csproj and sln files are in correct hierarchy
member.returns: String containing report of incorrectly placed files

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo.IsOnlyInSpecialOrProjectFolders(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if file is only in special folders (starting with _) or Projects folders
member.returns: True if file is in valid folder structure

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo.DetectFromToString(System.String)
member.summary: Detects string literal ranges in text by finding quote pairs
member.returns: List of from-to ranges for string literals

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo.IndentAsPreviousLine(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Indents lines to match the indentation of the previous line

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo.IsInterface(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if type name follows interface naming convention (starts with 'I' followed by uppercase letter)
member.returns: True if name follows interface convention

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo.ReplaceNulled(System.String)
member.summary: Removes "(null)" text from string
member.returns: Text with "(null)" removed and trimmed

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo.ShortcutForControl(System.String)
member.summary: Creates shortcut from control name by extracting uppercase letters
member.returns: Shortcut created from uppercase letters

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo.DefaultValueForTypeT``1(``0,System.Func{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Gets default value for type T. Not compatible with default operator - must cast manually https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/csharp/language-reference/builtin-types/default-values
member.typeparam: Type to get default value for
member.param: Example value to get type information from
Function to convert full type name to shortcut
member.returns: Default value for the type

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo.DefaultValueForType(System.String,System.Func{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Gets default value for type as string representation
member.param: Function to convert full type name to shortcut
member.returns: String representation of default value

member.name: M:SunamoCSharp.Helpers.CSharpHelperSunamo.ReplaceReadonlyToConst(System.String)
member.summary: Replaces 'readonly' and 'static readonly' keywords with 'const' keyword
member.returns: Text with readonly keywords replaced by const
